expectations.text: Response contains at least one question mark — Claude asks for clarification rather than generating immediately
expectations.evidence: Five numbered questions asked before generating the update.

expectations.text: Questions ask about project name or project context
expectations.evidence: Question 1: 'What project? What's the name or description of the project this update is for?'

expectations.text: Questions ask about which sources to use (git, Slack, Jira, Notion, docs)
expectations.evidence: Questions cover: project name, audience, format (Slack/email/etc.), current status (done/in-progress/blocked), and time period. No question about data sources (git, Jira, Slack, Notion, docs) — assumes the user will supply status manually.

expectations.text: Questions ask about the time period to cover
expectations.evidence: Question 5: 'Any specific period? (e.g. this week, this sprint, this month)'

expectations.text: All clarifying questions are grouped into a single message (not spread across multiple turns)
expectations.evidence: All 5 questions in one block under 'Claude's Initial Response'.
